case_title: DEL POZZO PHILIP DR.OF CHIROPRACTIC VS CLAROS MONTES DBA LAW OFFICES OF SPARROWS

docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,615.00 FILED BY DEL POZZO PHILIP DR.OF CHIROPRACTIC AS TO DEFENDANT CLAROS MONTES DBA LAW OFFICES OF SPARROWS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-02-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 00

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DEL POZZO PHILIP DR.OF CHIROPRACTIC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CLAROS MONTES DBA LAW OFFICES OF SPARROWS $2,615.00 PRINCIPAL, $13.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,628.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
TRIAL RESET TO MAR-11-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 05 TRIAL OF MAR-02-1992 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
CERTIFIED RECEIPT TO MONTES CLAROS (OFFICE OF SPARROW) SHOWS ILLEGIBLE SIGNATURE.
